summary: Iteration 35: Brand Competition/Bidding System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Admin Brands tab showing 39 active brands (42 total cards), Parent Portal Offers tab showing 12 real brand offers with toggle and dismiss functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Brand competition system properly implemented with bid_amount and problem_category fields
Weighted rotation algorithm correctly prioritizes higher bidders
Opt-out analytics provides clear student/guardian opt-in rates
Competition endpoint returns brands sorted by bid_amount descending
seed_data_creation: 34 real US brands seeded via seed_brands.py with 12 brand offers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand competition system fully tested. 39 active brands across 12 problem categories. Competition endpoints working. Offers tab in Parent Portal shows 12 real brand offers with toggle on/off and dismiss functionality.

opt_out_analytics: Opt-in/out rates within valid range (0-100%) - PASSED
Student counts add up correctly - PASSED
competition_endpoints: GET /api/brands/competition/education_tech returns competing brands sorted by bid - PASSED
GET /api/brands/competition/reading_literacy returns Scholastic, Epic!, Audible Kids - PASSED
Empty category returns empty list - PASSED
Brand data structure includes id, name, bid_amount, total_impressions, rotation_count, budget_remaining - PASSED
brand_listing: Brands list has 39+ active brands - PASSED
brand_offers: 12+ brand offers exist after seeding - PASSED
brand_eligibility: Brand eligibility endpoint returns brands grouped by category - PASSED
Eligibility respects student ad preferences - PASSED
problem_categories: 8+ categories have brands (education_tech, healthy_food, sports_active, arts_creativity, etc.) - PASSED

42 brand cards with data-testid found - PASSED

Brand cards show: name, description, products, categories, impressions, spent, remaining - PASSED

Brand names visible: LeapFrog, Scholastic, Nike, Crayola, LEGO, Greenlight, Epic!, Osmo, Audible, Gabb - PASSED

brand_competition_system.weighted_rotation: Higher bid = higher probability of selection (up to 2 brands per category)
brand_competition_system.budget_tracking: budget_total, budget_spent, budget_remaining tracked per brand

seeded_offers: Back to School Sale - 30% Off (Nike Kids)
